test_view_points.viewpoint: Check UI of sidebar on many browsers and all page:
expected_result: Display exactly UI as the design:
- Left Sidebar/Right Sidebar/Left-Right Sidebar)
- width... height...

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check functions that set on sidebar
expected_result: Display exactly name, order, text color the same with spec
Ex:
- Quick Search
- inputbox
- pull down menu
- Menu item

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check menu/link text/ image of each function with no submenu
expected_result: - Hover mouse: highlight text, active mouse, show link at the end of page
- Click on link or image: open exact page and highlight exact selected link

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check menu/link text/image of each function with submenus

main_menu: - Hover mouse: highlight text, active mouse, no show link at the end of page
- Click on link/image: open submenus right under main menu
- Click on link/image again: close submenus
submenu: - Hover mouse: highlight text, active mouse, show link at the end of page
- Click on link/image: open exact page and highlight exact selected link

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check link if title function on side bar has text and image/icon
test_view_points.expected_result: Clicking on image and clicking on text link will be opened the same page

viewpoints.expected_result: Menu on sidebar operate exactly page (no duplicate page)

viewpoints.action: Click many links on Sidebar continuously
viewpoints.expected_result: Menu on sidebar operate exactly, open exact selected link

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check using Tab and press Enter to choose items on Side bar
expected_result: Can use Tab key to move items on Sidebar
Can select items by pressing Enter and open exactly page
- Default display Hide icon
- UI of sidebar is changed to compact form
- Change Hide icon to Show icon

viewpoints.action: Check operating of sidebar when hiding
expected_result: - All icon will be active
- Click on menu (no sub): open exact page and still keep compact form
- Click on menu (has sub): display submenu pane
- UI of sidebar is changed to full/default form
- Change Show icon to Hide icon

viewpoints.expected_result: Sidebar will be auto responding follow dimension of screen
Sidebar will be auto responding follow dimension of screen

viewpoints.action: Check zoom in, zoom out screen
viewpoints.expected_result: Sidebar will be auto responding follow action: zoom in/out of screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click/press link when The Internet disconnect

expected_result: Base on spec, sidebar will fixed or move follow scroll screen
Highlight menu that selected with fixed side bar or Highlight corresponding menu

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operating sidebar on many browsers
test_view_points.expected_result: On all browsers, sidebar will operate exactly
